dialogue_text: It shall not be, my princess,
source_excerpt: "It shall not be, my princess," I cried. "There is, there must be some way, and John Carter, who has fought his way through a strange world for love of you, will find it."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
